status: precommitted after content-free byte-identical input staging and before any paid or remote evaluator call
classification: paired official-harness evaluation on inspected and consumed LongMemEval-S dev42; V13 is a zero-model local retrieval replay over reused V7 compiler artifacts, not a fresh end-to-end, untouched, heldout, third-party, competitor, or publishable 95 percent score
purpose: Evaluate frozen V7-control and V13-first predictions contemporaneously under the same frozen answerer, judge, routing, transport, cutoff, denominator, retry, and failure-preservation policy.

baseline_protocol.name: V11 fair paired development protocol
changes_for_v13: replace V11 replay prediction input with the frozen V13 first replay input
retain V7 as a newly evaluated contemporaneous control
stage and seal both input copies before execution
require fresh provider, campaign, and EUR-governance admission evidence before any paid call

scope.selection: all 42 questions exactly once per variant; no score-dependent inclusion or exclusion
scope.denominator_policy: 42 questions at each cutoff for each variant; missing, failed, empty, or unauditable output makes the attempt incomplete and cannot be silently removed

official_harness.max_output_tokens_binding: LLMClient.generate and LLMClient.generate_structured both default max_tokens to 4096; answerer and judge call sites do not override it
official_harness.generation_retry_policy: exact frozen harness policy: at most five automatic attempts inside the single invocation for one generation

openai_sdk.backoff: exponential with 0.75-to-1.0 multiplicative jitter unless a Retry-After value in (0,60] is supplied

official_harness.retry_disclosure: automatic pre-result transport/generation retries are not selective question reruns; every attempt must remain in the content-free ledger and logs

evaluator.credential_isolation: the real OpenRouter key is inherited only by the proxy subprocess, immediately unset in orchestration, and explicitly removed from the official harness environment
evaluator.runtime_authorization: OPENROUTER_API_KEY environment only; never accepted in argv, JSON, logs, manifests, or source

variants.label: v7-control
variants.classification: frozen V7 predictions newly evaluated as the contemporaneous control

variants.label: v13-first
variants.classification: V13 local retrieval/render over reused V7 compiler artifacts on consumed dev42

budget_governance.fuse_enforcement: frozen proxy soft fuse with a USD 0.05 in-flight reservation per request and USD 0.01 safety reserve
budget_governance.projection_qualification: the combined configured soft fuses are the campaign projection; provider-reported request cost can arrive after an in-flight reservation, so this is not represented as a cryptographic absolute billing bound

execution_admission.eur_formula: (fresh campaign observed USD + 2.50 USD) * frozen USD-to-EUR rate <= 300 EUR

execution_order: verify the externally published precommit SHA, every bound source seal, both staged-copy manifests, and the absence of attempt1
recompute the campaign audit and capture fresh content-free provider telemetry and a trusted USD-to-EUR snapshot
prepare fresh byte-identical writable attempt1 copies from both sealed read-only staged copies before any model request
freeze an execution-authorization record binding both working-copy manifests and proving provider, campaign, and EUR headroom before any model request
run V7-control once with a fresh proxy and a separate new ledger
freeze and verify content-free between-variant provider telemetry before starting V13-first
run V13-first once with a fresh proxy and a separate new ledger
audit each 42-question result, verify staged and original inputs stayed unchanged, and seal success or the complete failure state

failure_rule.preserve: all staged inputs, working copies, authorization records, ledgers, health records, proxy logs, evaluator logs, partial outputs, audits, exit statuses, and provider telemetry
forbid: dropping a question or failed result
selectively rerunning or resuming a question after any score is visible
changing models, providers, routing, prompts, reasoning, temperature, cutoffs, denominator, or order
combining a later retry with this attempt
failure_rule.disposition: seal the attempt as failed or incomplete; any later campaign requires a new precommit and a new attempt root

permitted_claim: paired consumed-development V7-control versus V13-local-replay result
